rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports and features.
Use implementation-level bindings in component implementation annexes only when valid in that scope.
generic_rules: Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts.
Only include assumptions and guarantees in AGREE annexes when concrete bounds or named constants are provided.
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for constants and equations; avoid invalid type references.
Ensure type consistency between assumed types and actual data types in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Constants and equations in AGREE must use valid scalar types (int, real, bool).
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not generate range or equality clauses for Boolean ports without explicit scalar representation.
